ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "regional_indicator" TEXT /* Regional indicator (e.g., Western Europe) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_regional_indicator FOREIGN KEY ("regional_indicator") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "ladder_score" REAL /* Overall ladder score */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the ladder score */,
  "upperwhisker" REAL /* Upper whisker of the ladder score */,
  "lowerwhisker" REAL /* Lower whisker of the ladder score */,
  "logged_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Logged GDP per capita */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption */,
  "ladder_score_in_dystopia" REAL /* Ladder score in Dystopia */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia + residual */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the ladder score */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explained_by" (
  "explained_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explained record */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the score ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the explained factors were recorded */,
  "log_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Log GDP per capita explained by the score */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support explained by the score */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy explained by the score */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices explained by the score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity explained by the score */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption explained by the score */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explained_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explained_by_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "number_of_countries" INTEGER /* Number of countries in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the happiness score being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the score */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)
